summary: The diff addresses all three requirements. REQ-1 (karigar PDF export format) is implemented in KarigarDetail.tsx with grouped-by-design HTML-based PDF export including design images. REQ-2 (karigar name sync) is implemented by enriching orders via useGetAllMasterDesignMappings in TotalOrdersTab.tsx and KarigarsTab.tsx, with query cache invalidation in useQueries.ts. REQ-3 (desktop sidebar overlap) is fixed in App.tsx using a flex layout with SidebarInset. All three requirements appear to be addressed.

hallucinated_features.description: A backend migration module (migration.mo) was added that migrates the actor state by removing designImages and masterDesignExcel blob storage fields from the stable state.
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request only asked for three frontend/UI fixes: PDF export format, karigar name sync, and sidebar overlap. No backend migration or removal of blob storage fields from the actor was requested.
